metadata.description: UK-specific Claude Code plugins for property investors, solicitors, small business owners, and project managers. Real SKILL.md format, MCP-backed where relevant, cross-checked against Anthropic's official agent skill standard.

plugins.name: foundations
plugins.description: The BOUCH Skills Foundations pack — 10 curated Claude skills. Seven MCP-backed via Ledgerhall (property, legal, DD), three standalone (humaniser, bouch-voice, workflow-auditor).

plugins.name: property
plugins.description: UK property investment plugin — 7 skills backed by real Land Registry, Rightmove, and EPC data. Full analysis, deal screening, BUY/WATCH/PASS verdicts, motivated-seller finder.

plugins.name: legal-os
plugins.description: BOUCH Legal OS — 7 skills for UK legal research. Legislation lookup, case law, HMRC/VAT, parliamentary intent, MP research, full legal briefs with OSCOLA citations. MCP-backed via Ledgerhall.
